scope: single-seed fixed-subset causal audit of coordinate-score memorization and full-time resampling; no production checkpoint initialization, joint generation, H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT

training.independent_initialization: both stages restore the same seed-5914 initial state

decision_rule.exact_fail: the unchanged forward/head/loss cannot memorize visible finite states; stop and inspect the implementation chain
decision_rule.exact_pass_resampled_fail: the finite states are representable but the active path over time/noise is not learned on fixed endpoints; inspect time conditioning and path representation
decision_rule.fixed_pass_unseen_gap: the path is learnable on fixed endpoints but source coupling does not generalize; prioritize leakage-safe structural pretraining or sample-efficient representation
decision_rule.fixed_and_unseen_pass: the substrate is learnable and prior failure is attributable to optimization budget or joint training allocation; freeze a separate production-pretraining proposal
decision_rule.boundary: No result changes historical H1a failures or authorizes extra seeds, silent step extension, joint initialization, H1b, tensor conditioning or later Gates.
